message:
fix: Inline object functions to avoid allowzero-to-non-allowzero cast

Zig rejects @ptrCast from [*]allowzero u8 to [*]u8 at compile time.
The zerobuf.zig C ABI functions expect non-allowzero pointers, so we
can't pass WASM base address 0 to them. Rewrite all object functions
to use wasm_load_*/wasm_store_* helpers directly instead.
